(herein after, "Arajet"). Dominican Republic. This Policy explains how your personal data is collected, stored, used, and disclosed. It also tells you how you can access and update your personal data and make certain choices about how it is used. This Policy encompasses our data collection activities online and by other methods, including Personal Data that we collect through our various channels such as web pages, apps, social networks, points of sale, and events. We inform you that we combine the Personal Data that we collect through different methods. SOURCES OF PERSONAL DATA Personal information is collected through: Websites.
